name: VLSI Physical Design Fundamentals
desc: Hands-on training project covering the complete IC physical design flow, including floorplanning concepts, placement, routing fundamentals, and basic timing awareness.

name: Standard Cell Layout Design
desc: Designed standard cell layouts for basic logic gates (INV, NAND, NOR) using stick diagrams and layout rules, focusing on DRC/LVS clean designs.

name: Logic Gates Stick Diagram
desc: Created stick diagrams for CMOS logic gates to understand transistor placement, diffusion sharing, and metal routing before layout implementation.

name: Chip Design Flow Study
desc: Studied the complete digital IC design flow from RTL to GDSII, including synthesis concepts, standard cell usage, and physical verification overview.
